<!-- vignettes/knowledge-evolution/_setup.qmd
     Shared setup partial for the knowledge-evolution page set. Included as
     the FIRST body line of every page in this folder (see index.qmd and
     siblings). Re-runs the shared hover-popup infrastructure and the
     original data-loading setup chunk on every page, since each page is now
     an independent render target (JohnGavin/llm#778 Phase 1).
-->

{{< include /_includes/hover-popups.qmd >}}

```{r setup}
#| include: false
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(gt)
library(visNetwork)
library(ggraph)
library(igraph)

theme_dashboard <- theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

# Priority 0: CI-safe path — read pre-computed aggregates from committed RDS.
# knowledge/ is gitignored (wiki-storage-policy), so live file counts return 0
# in CI. The committed RDS ships aggregate-only stats from the last local build.
# Note: return() is invalid at chunk top-level; use Find() to select the first
# existing path, then readRDS() it outside the for loop.
kb_stats <- tryCatch({
  rds_candidates <- c(
    here::here("inst/extdata/vignettes/vig_kb_stats.rds"),
    "../inst/extdata/vignettes/vig_kb_stats.rds"
  )
  rds_hit <- Find(file.exists, rds_candidates)
  if (!is.null(rds_hit)) readRDS(rds_hit) else NULL
}, error = function(e) NULL)

# CI-safe topic-graph adjacency — loaded before the live scan below.
kg_graph <- tryCatch({
  rds_candidates <- c(
    here::here("inst/extdata/vignettes/vig_kb_graph.rds"),
    "../inst/extdata/vignettes/vig_kb_graph.rds"
  )
  rds_hit <- Find(file.exists, rds_candidates)
  if (!is.null(rds_hit)) readRDS(rds_hit) else NULL
}, error = function(e) NULL)

# Try to load from local pulse data
kb_dir <- path.expand("~/.claude/logs/knowledge")
parquet_files <- list.files(kb_dir, pattern = "\\.parquet$", full.names = TRUE)

kb_data <- NULL
if (length(parquet_files) > 0 && requireNamespace("DBI", quietly = TRUE) && requireNamespace("duckdb", quietly = TRUE)) {
  tryCatch({
    con <- DBI::dbConnect(duckdb::duckdb())
    kb_data <- DBI::dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
      "SELECT * FROM read_parquet('%s/*.parquet')",
      kb_dir
    )) |>
      mutate(
        snapshot_date = as.Date(snapshot_date),
        value = as.numeric(value)
      )
    DBI::dbDisconnect(con, shutdown = TRUE)
  }, error = function(e) NULL)
}

# Fallback: count files directly.
# In CI, ~/docs_gh/llm/knowledge resolves to a non-existent home — the data
# we want lives at <repo>/knowledge/. Probe the repo-relative path first so
# this works both in CI and locally (per #144 + portable-paths rule).
.kb_candidates <- c(here::here("knowledge"), path.expand("~/docs_gh/llm/knowledge"))
kb_path <- Find(dir.exists, .kb_candidates)
if (is.null(kb_path)) kb_path <- .kb_candidates[1]  # last-resort
wiki_dir <- file.path(kb_path, "wiki")
raw_dir <- file.path(kb_path, "raw")

# Live adjacency scan — runs only when the RDS is absent and wiki_dir is local.
if (is.null(kg_graph) && dir.exists(wiki_dir)) {
  .wf <- list.files(wiki_dir, pattern = "\\.md$",
                    full.names = TRUE, recursive = FALSE)
  if (length(.wf) > 0L) {
    .pn <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(.wf))
    .el <- lapply(.wf, function(f) {
      src  <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(f))
      txt  <- paste(readLines(f, warn = FALSE), collapse = "\n")
      raw  <- regmatches(txt, gregexpr("\\[\\[.+?\\]\\]", txt, perl = TRUE))[[1L]]
      tgts <- sub("^\\[\\[", "", sub("\\]\\]$", "", raw))
      if (length(tgts) == 0L) return(NULL)
      data.frame(from = src, to = tgts, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    })
    .ed <- do.call(rbind, Filter(Negate(is.null), .el))
    if (is.null(.ed))
      .ed <- data.frame(from = character(0L), to = character(0L),
                        stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    .all <- unique(c(.pn, if (nrow(.ed) > 0L) .ed$to else character(0L)))
    .ib  <- if (nrow(.ed) > 0L) table(.ed$to) else integer(0L)
    .nd  <- data.frame(
      id      = .all,
      label   = .all,
      domain  = sub("-.*", "", .all),
      inbound = as.integer(.ib[.all]),
      broken  = !.all %in% .pn,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    .nd$inbound[is.na(.nd$inbound)] <- 0L
    .nd$orphan <- .nd$id %in% .pn & .nd$inbound == 0L
    kg_graph <- list(nodes = .nd, edges = .ed)
    rm(.wf, .pn, .el, .ed, .all, .ib, .nd)
  }
}

if (is.null(kb_data)) {
  if (!is.null(kb_stats)) {
    # Priority 1: Use pre-computed RDS aggregates (CI-safe, knowledge/ gitignored).
    # page_words keys are anonymized (page_001, page_002, …) to avoid path leakage.
    fallback_kb <- list(
      n_pages       = kb_stats$n_pages,
      n_sources     = kb_stats$n_sources,
      provenance_pct = kb_stats$provenance_pct,
      ai_inferred   = kb_stats$ai_inferred_markers,
      page_words    = kb_stats$page_words,
      with_sources  = kb_stats$with_sources
    )
  } else {
    # Priority 2: Live file counts — only available when knowledge/ exists locally.
    # Wiki pages
    if (dir.exists(wiki_dir)) {
      wiki_files <- list.files(wiki_dir, pattern = "\\.md$", full.names = TRUE)
      n_pages <- length(wiki_files)

      # Count words per page
      page_words <- sapply(wiki_files, function(f) {
        content <- paste(readLines(f, warn = FALSE), collapse = " ")
        length(strsplit(content, "\\s+")[[1]])
      })

      # Check for sources and AI-inferred
      with_sources <- sum(sapply(wiki_files, function(f) {
        any(grepl("^## Sources", readLines(f, warn = FALSE)))
      }))
      ai_inferred <- sum(sapply(wiki_files, function(f) {
        sum(grepl("AI-inferred", readLines(f, warn = FALSE)))
      }))
    } else {
      n_pages <- 0
      page_words <- numeric(0)
      with_sources <- 0
      ai_inferred <- 0
    }

    # Raw sources
    if (dir.exists(raw_dir)) {
      raw_files <- list.files(raw_dir, recursive = TRUE)
      n_sources <- length(raw_files)
    } else {
      n_sources <- 0
    }

    fallback_kb <- list(
      n_pages = n_pages,
      n_sources = n_sources,
      provenance_pct = if (n_pages > 0) round(with_sources * 100 / n_pages) else 0,
      ai_inferred = ai_inferred,
      page_words = page_words,
      with_sources = with_sources
    )
  }
}

# Create latest dataset if kb_data exists (used by all metric chunks)
latest <- NULL
if (!is.null(kb_data)) {
  latest <- kb_data |> filter(snapshot_date == max(snapshot_date))
}
```
